name: Beet Cabbage Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped beets, onions, cabbage, red sweet pepper, celery, salt, sugar, and chopped cauliflower in a large bowl.
2. Add mustard seeds and celery seeds.
3. Pour vinegar over the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil in a pot.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring frequently, until all vegetables are tender.
